ads.author: Justin Jotso
ads.title: Arcade parties starting at $350.00 ( or $15.00 per person all day game play arcade ,bar & pizzeria )
ads.description: Fun for all ages adults , teens and kids All games are on free play . There is a $15.00 wrist band charge to play the games unlimited all day. The prize machines and pool tables are not part of the $15.00 wrist band price those games accept dollar bills only for your convenience. Those who want to take advantage of the food and drink services both dine in and take out may do so and do not require a game play wristband. At any time during your visit you can purchase a wristband if you decide to play games. looking to book an upcomimg birthday party or other special event . We can gladly accommodate with unbeatable prices and service. All bookings offer 2 hour reserved seating for up to 24 people , 3 pizzas , 10 caned drinks , 10 hand dipped ice cream cups and 10 game play wristbands( good from the time of your party till close ) and party decorations. ....Over 21 and love games we can make a Custom package more adult based All you need to do is show up and have fun we cover the rest. Its your speciall day so why should you do any of the workl your job is to have fun We are Lake City / Columbia county’s only retro video game arcade , bar and pizzeria. We have fun for all ages . We’re a great place for date nights and family outings. We also are a great location if you’re looking for a new regular spot that’s an alternative to a traditional bar / pub. We have some of the best food in town and our pizza is hand tossed NY style pizza Facebook.com/retrocityarcadefl 1051 E. Duval St. Lake City, FL 32055 Phone: [hidden information] Email: [hidden information] HOURS: Monday - wendsday closed Thursday 3pm-10pm. Friday 3pm-10pm Saturday noon-10pm. Sunday 1-7pm
